title: Silver Chrome Ice Cube Glass Dimmable Touch Table Lamp Ideal For Bedside H10cm
features: Requires 1 x G9 capsule 33W max, lamps not included
Touch lamp perfect for any style of home
description: With a minimalistic design, The ice cube table lamp has a Four stage dimmer feature. The cube design has a Chrome base and a cut out clear glass shade. Place on a coffee table or office desk for a simple but effective design. Care instructions: wipe with a soft cloth.
